    A

    Account - Class in com.bankcore.model
    Represents a bank account.
    Account(String, double) - Constructor for class com.bankcore.model.Account
     
    AccountNotFoundException - Exception Class in com.bankcore.exceptions
    Represents a checked exception thrown when an account id don't exist.
    AccountNotFoundException(String) - Constructor for exception class com.bankcore.exceptions.AccountNotFoundException
    create a new AccountNotFoundException thrown when an account id don't exist.
    AccountRepository - Class in com.bankcore.repository
    Reprsent Account history that holds all accounts and all transactions
    AccountRepository() - Constructor for class com.bankcore.repository.AccountRepository
     
    addTransaction(String, Transaction) - Method in class com.bankcore.repository.AccountRepository
    add a transaction to transactionhistory.
    applyInterest() - Static method in class com.bankcore.BankCoreApplication
     
    applyInterest() - Method in interface com.bankcore.interfaces.Interestable
     
    applyInterest() - Method in class com.bankcore.model.SavingsAccount
    Applies annual interest to the balance.
    applyInterest(String) - Method in class com.bankcore.service.BankService
    Applies the annual interest rate to a savings account balance.
    applyTax() - Static method in class com.bankcore.BankCoreApplication
     
    applyTax(double) - Method in interface com.bankcore.interfaces.Taxable
     
    applyTax(double) - Method in class com.bankcore.model.SavingsAccount
    apply tax in the current balance
    applyTax(String, double) - Method in class com.bankcore.service.BankService
    Applies a tax rate to the balance of a savings account.

    B

    BankCoreApplication - Class in com.bankcore

    BankService - Class in com.bankcore.service
    Core banking service that handles all business operations.

    Constructs a BankService with the given account repository.

    C

    CheckingAccount - Class in com.bankcore.model
    Represents a checking account with overdraft and transaction fees.
    CheckingAccount(String, double, double, double) - Constructor for class com.bankcore.model.CheckingAccount
    Creates a new checking account.

    D

    delete(String) - Method in class com.bankcore.repository.AccountRepository
    delete an account by account id if accoun id dont exist throw exception in compile time
    deleteAccount(String) - Method in class com.bankcore.service.BankService
    Permanently deletes an account from the system.
    deposit() - Static method in class com.bankcore.BankCoreApplication
     
    deposit(double) - Method in class com.bankcore.model.Account
    Deposits amount into the account.
    deposit(String, double) - Method in class com.bankcore.service.BankService
    Deposits the specified amount into the account and records the transaction.

    I

    InsufficientFundsException - Exception Class in com.bankcore.exceptions
    Represents a checked exception thrown when a withdrawal amount exceeds the available account balance.
    InsufficientFundsException(double, double) - Constructor for exception class com.bankcore.exceptions.InsufficientFundsException
    create a new InsufficientFundsException thrown when a withdrawal amount exceeds the available account balance.

    Transaction - Class in com.bankcore.model
    Represents a transaction with transaction type transaction time id transaction amount and balance after the transaction.

    Create a new transaction for deposit
    Transaction(String, String, double, double, TransactionType) - Constructor for class com.bankcore.model.Transaction
    Create a new transaction for transfer
    TransactionType - Enum Class in com.bankcore.model
     
    transfer(String, String, double) - Method in class com.bankcore.service.BankService
    Transfers the specified amount from one account to another.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.bankcore.model.TransactionType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class com.bankcore.model.TransactionType

    W

    withdraw() - Static method in class com.bankcore.BankCoreApplication
     
    withdraw(double) - Method in class com.bankcore.model.Account
    Withdraws amount from the account.
    withdraw(double) - Method in class com.bankcore.model.CheckingAccount
    Withdraws amount plus transaction fee from the account.
    withdraw(double) - Method in class com.bankcore.model.SavingsAccount
    Withdraws amount from the savings account.
    withdraw(String, double) - Method in class com.bankcore.service.BankService
    Withdraws the specified amount from the account and records the transaction.
    WITHDRAWAL - Enum constant in enum class com.bankcore.model.TransactionType
